title: habenaria walleri
intro: Habenaria walleri, also known as the Waller's Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. It is a terrestrial orchid with medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and fungi. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
